name: MALLOW EYEBALL 5G
description:
MALLOW EYEBALL 5G

Product Description:

Fruity flavoured jam filled marshmallow eyeball various colours and flavours chosen randomly.

Great for parties, stocking fillers and Halloween.

Ingredients:

sugar, glucose syrup, dextrose, modified corn starch, gleatin (beef), hydroxypprophyl distartch phosphate, pectin, sorbitol, citric acid, malic acid, sodium citrate, flavours, colours E129, E102, E110, E133.
